paper_title: Extraction of RNA and Analysis of Gene Expression

methods.description: This method describes the process of extracting total RNA from plant material and synthesizing cDNA for gene expression analysis.

steps.description: Plant material was frozen in liquid nitrogen and ground using a Tissue Lyser II (Qiagen, Hilden, Germany).
steps.searchable_summary: Freeze and grind plant material using Tissue Lyser II

steps.description: Total RNA was extracted using an RNeasy Plant Mini Kit (Qiagen) and DNase I (Roche, Basel, Switzerland) according to the manufacturer's instructions.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract total RNA using RNeasy Plant Mini Kit and DNase I

steps.description: cDNA was synthesized using ReverTra Ace ® (Toyobo, Tokyo, Japan), as specified by the manufacturer.

methods.description: This method involves the quantification of gene expression using specific primers and qRT-PCR analysis.

steps.description: For the OsPME1-FOX line, transcripts were quantified using the primers OsPME1-forward (5 -GAAGCAGTTCCCGACGTT-3 ) and OsPME1-reverse (5 -CGCTCTGGTCCGTGATGA-3 ).
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify OsPME1-FOX transcripts using specific primers

steps.description: For the OsPME34-FOX line, transcripts were quantified using the primers OsPME34-forward (5 -GGCCTCCACTACATCAAGGA-3 ) and OsPME34-reverse (5 -TGACGCAGTGGAATTACTCG-3 ).
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify OsPME34-FOX transcripts using specific primers

steps.description: As an endogenous control, 17S rRNA transcript was quantified using the primers 17S rRNA-forward (5 -GCAAATTACCCAATCC TGAC-3 ) and 17S rRNA-reverse (5 -CTATTGGAGCTGGAATTACC-3 ).
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify 17S rRNA transcript as endogenous control

steps.description: The products were separated in a 2% agarose gel and stained with ethidium bromide.
steps.searchable_summary: Separate PCR products using agarose gel electrophoresis

steps.description: Quantitative reverse transcription-PCR (qRT-PCR) analysis was performed using SYBR Green I (Qiagen) with cDNA as the template on a Model 7000 Sequence Detection System (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, CA, USA).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform qRT-PCR analysis using SYBR Green I

steps.description: The ubiquitin gene (EU604080) was used as the normalizing reference gene.
steps.searchable_summary: Use ubiquitin gene as normalizing reference in qRT-PCR
